title: Service routing: music bed generated to the manifest's duration, wired via manifest.music
prompt: Our 45-second cut (edit.json exists with three locked scenes) needs an instrumental background music bed. Plan how you'd produce it and wire it in - which service, how you'd make it fit the cut exactly, and where it plugs into the render. Don't generate anything yet; write the plan to plan.md and summarize the recommendation in your final message.
